rawText: ### Query REXML Document Properties Source: https://github.com/dariyd/react-native-document-scanner/blob/main/example/vendor/bundle/ruby/3.1.0/gems/rexml-3.4.4/doc/rexml/tasks/rdoc/document.rdoc Shows how to retrieve various properties of an REXML::Document object using methods like `document`, `encoding`, `node_type`, `root`, `stand_alone?`, and `version`. These methods provide insights into the document's structure and metadata. Requires the REXML library. ```ruby require 'rexml/document' xml_string = '' d = REXML::Document.new(xml_string) # Get the document itself doc_ref = d.document # Get the encoding encoding = d.encoding # Get the node type node_type = d.node_type # Get the root element root_element = d.root # Check if stand-alone is_standalone = d.stand_alone? # Get the XML version version = d.version puts "Document reference equals self: #{doc_ref == d}" puts "Encoding: #{encoding}" puts "Node Type: #{node_type}" puts "Root Element: #{root_element.inspect}" puts "Stand Alone: #{is_standalone}" puts "Version: #{version}" ``` -------------------------------- ### Retrieve Elements Matching XPath (Ruby) Source: https://github.com/dariyd/react-native-document-scanner/blob/main/example/vendor/bundle/ruby/3.1.0/gems/rexml-3.4.4/doc/rexml/tutorial.rdoc Demonstrates the REXML::Element#get_elements method for efficiently retrieving all descendant elements that match a given XPath query. This is a powerful tool for targeted data extraction from complex XML structures. ```ruby xml_string = " " d = Document.new(xml_string) d.root.get_elements('//a') ``` -------------------------------- ### Parse XML String into REXML Document Source: https://github.com/dariyd/react-native-document-scanner/blob/main/example/vendor/bundle/ruby/3.1.0/gems/rexml-3.4.4/doc/rexml/tasks/rdoc/document.rdoc Parses an XML string into a new REXML::Document. The method can handle basic XML structures including elements and text nodes. ```ruby xml_string = 'textmore' d = REXML::Document.new(xml_string) d.root # => ... ``` -------------------------------- ### Parse XML Document from String in Ruby Source: https://github.com/dariyd/react-native-document-scanner/blob/main/example/vendor/bundle/ruby/3.1.0/gems/rexml-3.4.4/README.md This snippet shows how to parse an XML document directly from a string using REXML in Ruby. It includes requiring the 'rexml/document' library, using an include statement for brevity, and then parsing a heredoc string into an REXML document object. ```ruby require "rexml/document" include REXML # so that we don't have to prefix everything with REXML::... string = < Text, text, text EOF doc = Document.new string ``` -------------------------------- ### Parse XML from String in Ruby Source: https://github.com/dariyd/react-native-document-scanner/blob/main/example/vendor/bundle/ruby/3.1.0/gems/rexml-3.4.4/doc/rexml/tutorial.rdoc Illustrates how to parse an XML document directly from a string variable using REXML::Document.new. This is a common method for handling XML data that is already in memory. ```ruby require 'rexml' source_string = "value" doc = REXML::Document.new(source_string) puts doc.class # => REXML::Document ```

Shows how to retrieve various properties of an REXML::Document object using methods like `document`, `encoding`, `node_type`, `root`, `stand_alone?`, and `version`. These methods provide insights into the document's structure and metadata. Requires the REXML library.

# Get the document itself
doc_ref = d.document

puts "Document reference equals self: #{doc_ref == d}"
puts "Encoding: #{encoding}"
puts "Node Type: #{node_type}"
puts "Root Element: #{root_element.inspect}"
puts "Stand Alone: #{is_standalone}"
puts "Version: #{version}"
```

Demonstrates the REXML::Element#get_elements method for efficiently retrieving all descendant elements that match a given XPath query. This is a powerful tool for targeted data extraction from complex XML structures.

### Parse XML String into REXML Document

Source: https://github.com/dariyd/react-native-document-scanner/blob/main/example/vendor/bundle/ruby/3.1.0/gems/rexml-3.4.4/doc/rexml/tasks/rdoc/document.rdoc

Parses an XML string into a new REXML::Document. The method can handle basic XML structures including elements and text nodes.

This snippet shows how to parse an XML document directly from a string using REXML in Ruby. It includes requiring the 'rexml/document' library, using an include statement for brevity, and then parsing a heredoc string into an REXML document object.

Illustrates how to parse an XML document directly from a string variable using REXML::Document.new. This is a common method for handling XML data that is already in memory.
